query: Design a Phase II clinical trial protocol to evaluate the efficacy of a novel mRNA-based therapeutic vaccine (mRNA-4157) in combination with pembrolizumab for high-risk melanoma patients after complete resection.

Develop a clinical trial protocol to test the safety and preliminary efficacy of a new CAR-T cell therapy targeting CD19 in adult patients with relapsed or refractory B-cell acute lymphoblastic leukemia (B-ALL).
Propose a randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled trial to evaluate the use of a novel GLP-1 receptor agonist for weight management in non-diabetic obese patients over a 52-week period.
Design a clinical study to assess the efficacy of psilocybin-assisted psychotherapy compared to an active placebo (niacin) for the treatment of severe treatment-resistant depression.

Create an adaptive clinical trial design to evaluate multiple targeted therapies simultaneously in patients with advanced non-small cell lung cancer (NSCLC) based on specific biomarker profiles (e.g., EGFR, ALK, ROS1, KRAS).
expected_components: stopping rules for futility or efficacy
